parents.subject: LU-19549 osd-ldiskfs: missing prototypes build fix

commit.subject: LU-19553 dkms: inject depends on other dkms packages
commit.message:
LU-19553 dkms: inject depends on other dkms packages

When mlnx-ofed-kernel-dkms has been installed but not yet
built (new kernel has not yet booted) installing
lustre-client-dkms
fails to build correctly (due to building against an old set
of symbols).

This is theoretically true for several other possible
packages that lustre could be depending upon.

mlnx-ofed-kernel
zfs
cray-kfabric (and its dependencies)
  [cray-cxi-driver, cray-slingshot-base-link, kdreg2, sl-driver]

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12975
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I290595ff891352c22e0508e2c42b5aba356092ae
